Race #7 of 7 in the 2013 Custom Windows Plus Badger Mod Tour presented by Gandrud Chevrolet Season
Badger Mod Tour:2013-07
Held on October 4, 2013 at 141 Speedway in Francis Creek, WI
30 L, 9.9 M, 15.93 KM - Scheduled Distance
